title: 2 Tier Dish Drainer Rack with Drip Tray Stainless Steel Dish drainer with Draining Board and Utensils Holder Dish Drying Rack for Small Kitchen Countertop (Black)
features: ✅ Space-Saving 2 Tier Design – Maximise your kitchen space with this stylish 2 tier dish drainer rack, offering ample storage for plates, bowls, mugs, and cookware while keeping your countertop neat and organised.

✅ Integrated Draining Board Rack & Drip Tray – Features a removable draining board rack with drip tray that collects excess water efficiently, preventing spills and keeping your worktop clean and dry.

✅ Utensil Holder & Cutlery Drainer – Comes with a detachable utensil holder, cutlery holder, and side cutlery drainer to neatly store spoons, forks, knives, and kitchen tools for easy access and hygiene.

✅ Durable Stainless Steel Construction – Crafted from high-quality stainless steel in a sleek white and silver finish, this sturdy dish drying rack is rust-resistant, long-lasting, and designed to handle daily use.

✅ Essential Kitchen Accessories – A must-have for modern homes, this dish drying rack kitchen essential combines practicality with style, making it an ideal addition to your home essentials and kitchen accessories collection.
description: Upgrade your kitchen with the Royal Cuisine 2 Tier Dish Drainer Rack with Drip Tray, a perfect blend of functionality and style for modern households. Designed in an elegant white and silver finish, this stainless steel dish drainer is not just practical but also enhances the look of your countertop. Built with durability and convenience in mind, this drying rack kitchen essential helps you save space while keeping your dishes neatly organised and dry. The smart 2 tier dish drainer rack provides ample room to hold plates, bowls, mugs, and glasses on the top layer, while the bottom tier is perfect for larger cookware such as pans and serving dishes. Its detachable draining board rack with a drip tray ensures excess water is collected efficiently, keeping your kitchen counter clean and mess-free. This versatile dish drying solution comes with a spacious utensil holder that is ideal for spoons, forks, and knives, while the side cutlery drainer keeps smaller items organised. An additional cutlery holder allows you to separate silverware with ease, ensuring quick access whenever you need it. Every element has been thoughtfully designed to maximise storage without taking up too much space, making it a must-have in compact or busy kitchens. Crafted from high-quality stainless steel with a rust-resistant finish, this kitchen accessories set is strong, long-lasting, and easy to clean. Its sleek design makes it not only a practical dish drying rack but also a stylish addition to your home essentials. Whether you live alone, share a flat, or have a busy family kitchen, the Royal Cuisine Dish Drainer provides the perfect balance of efficiency and elegance. Keep your kitchen organised, hygienic, and clutter-free with this space-saving dish drying rack kitchen essential. A reliable choice for everyday use, it transforms the way you dry, store, and arrange your dishes effortlessly. Dimensions: LXWXH: 42cmx26cmx39cm
